title: then & now
content:
a hidden reader (i.e., a friend) has asked me for a reason for posting my messy room a couple of days ago. no, i didn't want to display to the world how unorganized i  **was** . the actual reason is i was planning to redo the room and the photos are for comparison.

after 2 days of eating dust ... the moment has come ... :)

!/gallery/misc/then_now_01.jpg!

[size=7]the big table was removed (becomes a TV stand),
replace with some  _bigger_  table. i love big table.[/size]

!/gallery/misc/then_now_02.jpg!

[size=7]my books have been living in the boxes for the past 3 years.
they deserve more than that. (some of the books got me thru college!)[/size]

!/gallery/misc/then_now_03.jpg!

[size=7]as mentioned above, the original big table.
(boxes are gone coz books are out.)[/size]

!/gallery/misc/then_now_04.jpg!

[size=7]BIGGG table .. spacy, roomy .. me like![/size]

!/gallery/misc/then_now_05.jpg!

[size=7]a table .. with a view (from TV). :P[/size]

!/gallery/misc/shelves.jpg!

[size=7]actually, there are more boxes of books.
but i think i'll just get some of the essentials out.[/size]

now it's time for me to start working seriously. :D

 %(me)one thing, my room is TOO SMALL!%
